edge_hypothesis: The only ema_rsi_atr ACCEPT (ea9p5k2m) used RSI bands 50-65 and scored PF=1.288 with transitional PF=2.765. This spec tests TWO innovations: (1) Ultra-narrow RSI bands (52-60 for long, 40-48 for short) to increase entry conviction by only trading when RSI is in a tight 'sweet spot' — not too hot, not too cold. (2) Higher R:R at 10:1 and 12:1 vs ea9p5k2m's 9:1. The narrow RSI band acts as a precision filter: RSI 52-60 means trend momentum is present but not overextended. Combined with the ATR volatility gate (only trade when volatility exceeds its 20-bar average), this targets the precise moment when a trending asset pauses briefly in a volatile market — the optimal setup for a continuation move. The wide RSI band variant (48-62) tests whether wider bands produce enough additional trades to compensate for lower average conviction. Invalidation: if PF < 0.9 with narrow bands (52-60), the precision filter is too tight and eliminates profitable trades along with noise.

variants.name: ema_rsi_atr_precision_10to1
variants.description: Ultra-narrow RSI bands (52-60 long / 40-48 short) with 10:1 R:R. The tightest RSI filter ever tested. Only enters when RSI is in the narrow conviction zone AND volatility is above average. Trades should be rare but high-quality.
entry_long: EMA_9 > EMA_21 confirms short-term bullish trend.
RSI_14 between 52 and 60 (narrow conviction zone — momentum present, not overextended).
ATR_14 > 20-bar ATR moving average (volatility gate — only trade in active markets).
entry_short: EMA_9 < EMA_21 confirms short-term bearish trend.
RSI_14 between 40 and 48 (narrow conviction zone — bearish momentum, not oversold).
ATR_14 > 20-bar ATR moving average (volatility gate — only trade in active markets).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (10.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Exit if EMA_9 crosses below EMA_21 (trend reversal for longs).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Ultra-narrow RSI band may produce too few trades for statistical significance
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 10.0x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: ema_rsi_atr_precision_12to1
variants.description: Same ultra-narrow RSI bands (52-60 / 40-48) pushed to 12:1 R:R. Tests whether higher R:R improves PF on the precision-filtered signal. ea9p5k2m succeeded at 9:1 — this is a 33% increase in R:R targeting only the largest continuation moves.
entry_long: EMA_9 > EMA_21 confirms short-term bullish trend.
entry_short: EMA_9 < EMA_21 confirms short-term bearish trend.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (12.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Exit if EMA_9 crosses below EMA_21 (trend reversal for longs).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Combining ultra-narrow bands with 12:1 R:R may produce too few winning trades
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 12.0x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: ema_rsi_atr_wide_precision_10to1
variants.description: Wider RSI bands (48-62 long / 38-52 short) at 10:1 R:R. Tests the trade-off: wider bands produce more entries (larger sample, more diversified), but lower average conviction. If this outperforms the ultra-narrow variant, conviction filtering has diminishing returns and trade count matters more.
entry_long: EMA_9 > EMA_21 confirms short-term bullish trend.
RSI_14 between 48 and 62 (moderate conviction zone — wider but still filtered).
entry_short: EMA_9 < EMA_21 confirms short-term bearish trend.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (10.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Exit if EMA_9 crosses below EMA_21 (trend reversal for longs).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Wider bands dilute entry quality, potentially dropping below fee-adjusted breakeven
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 10.0x ATR_14 from entry.
